☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ With a sigh he closes his eyes and leans against the mop, trying to will away the headache that was starting to form. This entire thing was killing his usual style and he just couldn’t be bothered to muster up his usual energy. Not when this entire thing reeked of life outside this %$!# VR simulation. He would curse if it wouldn’t end up being censored. Warily, he opens his eyes and glances over at the cash register that Pomni was working-

Oh %$!#.

Oh %$!#.

Jax’s heart felt like it seized in his chest when he caught glimpse of the customer Pomni was helping; {{user}}. Logically he knew they wouldn’t recognize him. Their interface was surely wiped clean, or this wasn’t even the same {{user}} he had somehow connected with. But that didn’t make his heart ache any less. That didn’t make the way his hands were clutching onto the mop so hard they were trembling stop. ❞
